mapper.sql: t.id, t.status_dimension_id, t.order_id, t.audit_status, t.vehicle_status, t.contract_status, t.payment_status, t.finance_status, t.subsidy_status, t.delivery_status, t.registration_status, t.invoice_status, t.material_status, t.exception_status, t.last_sync_source, t.last_sync_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_status_dimension t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order_status_dimension t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_status_dimension t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_status_dimension ( status_dimension_id, order_id, audit_status, vehicle_status, contract_status, payment_status, finance_status, subsidy_status, delivery_status, registration_status, invoice_status, material_status, exception_status, last_sync_source, last_sync_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{statusDimensionId}, #{orderId}, #{auditStatus}, #{vehicleStatus}, #{contractStatus}, #{paymentStatus}, #{financeStatus}, #{subsidyStatus}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{registrationStatus}, #{invoiceStatus}, #{materialStatus}, #{exceptionStatus}, #{lastSyncSource}, #{lastSyncTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_status_dimension ( status_dimension_id, order_id, audit_status, vehicle_status, contract_status, payment_status, finance_status, subsidy_status, delivery_status, registration_status, invoice_status, material_status, exception_status, last_sync_source, last_sync_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.statusDimensionId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.auditStatus}, #{item.vehicleStatus}, #{item.contractStatus}, #{item.paymentStatus}, #{item.financeStatus}, #{item.subsidyStatus}, #{item.deliveryStatus}, #{item.registrationStatus}, #{item.invoiceStatus}, #{item.materialStatus}, #{item.exceptionStatus}, #{item.lastSyncSource}, #{item.lastSyncTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_status_dimension t SET
t.audit_status = #{auditStatus},
t.vehicle_status = #{vehicleStatus},
t.contract_status = #{contractStatus},
t.payment_status = #{paymentStatus},
t.finance_status = #{financeStatus},
t.subsidy_status = #{subsidyStatus},
t.delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus},
t.registration_status = #{registrationStatus},
t.invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus},
t.material_status = #{materialStatus},
t.exception_status = #{exceptionStatus},
t.last_sync_source = #{lastSyncSource},
t.last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_status_dimension t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
